body.title: Migrate psutil callers to SystemProxy
body.result: 91976bae — 5 callers migrated: push_sources, inference_gateway, training_corpus, filesystem (2 sites). Only cluster_ssh remote exec retains direct psutil.
body.description: Route all scattered psutil.cpu_percent/virtual_memory/disk_usage calls through SystemProxy. Callers: ResourceMonitorSource, inference_gateway load check, filesystem.py memory_report, training_corpus RAM guard, cluster_ssh local stats. Remove direct psutil imports from migrated files.
